creator: markus.hoenicka@mhoenicka.de
text:
Thanks for handling this bug report. Apparently it was just a
case of me not reading the latest docs. I've used a similar fix as you
suggested, so I've been fine since upgrading to 8.0. If you update to
8.1 soon anyway, don't waste your time patching 8.0.

regards,
Markus
--
